form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 42-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2.5 len at this track February 26 over 1500m defeating Nuff Said with 55kg at $2.10. Before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 12 at this track on January 29 over 1500m, nose behind Veritas Porta with 55kg at $4.90. Hard to beat again.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 12 at Saga November 30 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sakidoritokken with 54kg at $24.60. form.formComment: She is resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last preparation winning by 2.5 len Kawasaki August 22 over 1500m defeating Sei Sorabol with 54kg at $63.10.
